tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold
tasks.description: Buildable Worker project with D1 + Vitest. Files: worker/{package.json,wrangler.jsonc,vitest.config.ts,tsconfig.json,src/index.ts,src/types.ts}. Verify: cd worker && npx vitest run && npx wrangler deploy --dry-run

tasks.subject: Task 1: D1 schema + migration/test infra
tasks.description: migrations/0001_init.sql, test/apply-migrations.ts, test/helpers.ts (resetDb), test/schema.test.ts. Verify: npx vitest run test/schema.test.ts

tasks.subject: Task 2: D1 query layer
tasks.description: src/db/queries.ts + test/queries.test.ts. auto-create idempotent, reverse upsert stable, countEventsSince, ownerDestinations.

tasks.subject: Task 4: MIME header surgery
tasks.description: src/lib/bytes.ts, src/lib/mime.ts + test/mime.test.ts. Byte-safe header edit, base64.

tasks.subject: Task 5: SES client
tasks.description: src/lib/ses.ts + test/ses.test.ts. SES v2 SendRawEmail via aws4fetch (service=ses), transient/permanent errors.

tasks.subject: Task 6: Reverse-alias logic + config
tasks.description: src/config.ts, src/lib/reverse.ts + test/reverse.test.ts. 120-bit token, get-or-create stable.

tasks.subject: Task 8: Inbound flow
tasks.description: src/email/inbound.ts + test/inbound.test.ts. Flow 5.1: guards + From rewrite + SES re-inject.

tasks.subject: Task 9: Reply flow
tasks.description: src/email/reply.ts + test/reply.test.ts. Flow 5.2: owner verify, send as alias, leak scrub.

tasks.subject: Task 11: Hono app + session middleware + auth routes
Task 14: SES SNS webhook + fetch wiring
Task 15: Dashboard scaffold + API client + auth
tasks.description: dashboard/ Vite React app, api client, auth context, login, stub pages. Verify: npm run build.
